name: Basik the Cat
overview: The most ordinary young programmer has a very unusual cat named Basik. He is endowed with supernatural intelligence. However, this does not surprise anyone. In the modern world, it is no longer customary to be surprised. And for nothing! After all, Basik is a really amazing cat. He is smart, discreet, caring, and a true gentleman. His funny adventures and clever antics will surprise and amuse not only the owner, but also the audience!
